name: Mitochondrial Transplantation Promotes Protective Effector and Memory CD4+ T Cell Response During Mycobacterium Tuberculosis Infection and Diminishes Exhaustion and Senescence in Elderly CD4+ T cells
summary: A peer-reviewed study of mitochondrial transfer in aged mouse CD4+ T-cell models and ex vivo CD4+ T cells from elderly humans, with immune activation, cytokine, exhaustion, and senescence endpoints.
